package crossfeature

// This fixture simulates a file inside one feature package that imports another
// sibling feature package. This violates the no-cross-feature rule (FF-02).
// The fitness script detects cross-feature imports via import path matching.

// VIOLATION: "internal/feature/init" importing "internal/feature/add" directly.
// In real Go this would be: import _ "github.com/.../internal/feature/add"
// The fixture is plain text so the fitness script can grep/scan it safely.

import (
	_ "github.com/Project-Builder-Schematics/project-builder-cli/internal/feature/add"
)
